info.name: Ginsengfood Ops Core API v1 Contract Smoke
info.description: Contract-only Postman collection for selected ops-core v1 APIs. Uses placeholder baseUrl and no secrets.

request.description: Expected contract response: common v1 envelope with sellable or availability data; standard error envelope for 400/401/403/404/409/422/500.
Expected contract response: public-safe SKU projection only.
Expected contract response: stock balance read model; inventory ledger must not be mutated by this request.
Expected contract response: public trace only, excluding internal operational data.
High-risk command contract. Requires owner/evidence/audit in real provider implementation.

body.raw:
